name: Polymorph
long_description:
we help consumer and self-serve apps build living profiles of every user to send personalized messaging at the right time and channel. we already support over 3.5M users across our customers.

users are unique and special, make them feel like it~

our team has extensive experience in the space having been in senior engineering leadership at Meta Ads, building out large-scale ML infrastructure at Scale AI, and iterating quickly and securely at startups like Gusto, Opal, and Nira.
